data.content: Plan review approved. Existing doctor/managed-skills infrastructure is well-wired (doctor.rs:87 extends checks, doctor_fix.rs:46-48 routes skills_* fixes). Plan correctly starts with reproduction, targets minimal semantic fix, and adds CLI regression coverage. File sizes are near limits but plan accounts for this. cli_skills.rs (96 lines) has room for new doctor integration tests. No invariants to check. Approved for implementation.
